prestazioni: 1NR-FE 1.3L VVT-i engine (101hp stock) upgraded with a HKS Super SQV4 blow-off valve to prevent compressor surge during aggressive 1-2 shifts on the stock 5-speed C58 manual transmission, paired with a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header by OBX Racing (part #OBX-11610) for optimized scavenging and mid-range torque gains (measured +12 ft-lbs at 4,800 RPM on a Dynojet 224xLC).

Forced induction via a Sprintex S200-12G supercharger (2.0L/min flow rate, 7.5 psi max boost) with a custom air-to-water intercooler setup using a Koyorad EQ Series core (12" x 6" x 3.5") and a Davies Craig EWP115 electric water pump, reducing intake temps by 45°F under sustained load (verified via AEM X-Series 30-0300 wideband AFR sensor).

Chassis reinforcement via Cusco Type RS 2-point strut tower bar (part #684 540 A) and a custom 3-point rear subframe brace by Battle Version (IQ-specific, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly), reducing body flex by 38% (measured via GTech Pro RR accelerometer) and enabling consistent 0.92g lateral grip on Toyo R888R 195/45R16 tires mounted on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (16x7 +35 offset, 12.8 lbs each).
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody conversion (IQ-specific, part #LB-SCION-IQ-01) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (2x2 twill weave, 200gsm) and extended rocker panels, increasing rear track width by 3.2" for aggressive stance without fender rolling (verified fitment with 225mm tires).

Custom front bumper lip by Varis Japan (part #VAR-SCION-IQ-FLIP) with integrated LED turn signals (Morimoto XB LED bulbs, 5500K) and a 3D-printed ABS splitter extension (designed in Fusion 360, CNC-milled) for -1.2° rake and improved high-speed stability (tested at 110 mph on Buttonwillow CW13).

Rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon (IQ-specific, part #SC-100001) with integrated dual 3" titanium exhaust tips by Fujitsubo (part #FUJ-100-1010, 900g each) and a custom LED taillight overlay (Plastidip smoked, 30% tint) housing Osram LED bulbs (6500K, 1200 lumens) for a JDM-inspired rear signature.
